title: STAR WARS™: The Force Unleashed™ Ultimate Sith Edition
STAR WARS™: The Force Unleashed™ Ultimate Sith Edition
notes: Might have something to do with .NET framework

Bypassed launcher by renaming "SWTFU.exe" to "SWTFU Launcher.exe" to get it started. Had to manually change resolution because of it (normally done in launcher) by changing config file located here: Local\ Settings/Application\ Data/Aspyr/Star\ Wars\ The\ Force\ Unleashed/Config.xml.
Works nicely in 4k, played through first 2 missions without any issues noticed.
title: STAR WARS™ - The Force Unleashed™ Ultimate Sith Edition

gpu: X.Org Radeon RX 580 Series (POLARIS10, DRM 3.26.0, 4.18.6-arch1-1-ARCH, LLVM 6.0.1)

title: STAR WARS™ - The Force Unleashed™ Ultimate Sith Edition

title: STAR WARS™ - The Force Unleashed™ Ultimate Sith Edition

notes: This game does not launch, and each time Steam tries to install the .NET Framework.
title: STAR WARS™ - The Force Unleashed™ Ultimate Sith Edition

notes:
To launch the game:
go to ~/.steam/Steam/steamapps/common/Star\ Wars\ The\ Force\ Unleashed/
remove the SWTFU Launcher.exe file
rename the SWTFU.exe file to SWTFU Launcher.exe

To change the screen resolution:
go to ~/.steam/Steam/steamapps/compatdata/32430/pfx/drive_c/users/steamuser/Local\ Settings/Application\ Data/Aspyr/Star\ Wars\ The\ Force\ Unleashed/
edit the Config.xml file

To unlock 60fps:
download https://community.pcgamingwiki.com/files/file/506-star-wars-the-force-unleashed-12-fps-cap-fix/
extract it
place the SWTFU.exe file from the extracted Star Wars - The Force Unleashed 60 FPS folder in ~/.steam/Steam/steamapps/common/Star\ Wars\ The\ Force\ Unleashed/
go to ~/.steam/Steam/steamapps/common/Star\ Wars\ The\ Force\ Unleashed/
remove the SWTFU Launcher.exe file
rename the SWTFU.exe file to SWTFU Launcher.exe


It tries to install the Microsoft .NET Framework on every launch, ignore it, it takes just some seconds
title: STAR WARS™ - The Force Unleashed™ Ultimate Sith Edition

notes:
Followed the instructions the previous user provided for using the bypass launcher, getting the correct screen resolution, and using the 60 fps unlock, and these all worked. But even with the 60 fps unlock, the framerate seems to constantly fluctuate to levels under 60 fps, but I haven't tested the game in Windows on the same machine for comparison. 

Initially couldn't get the Steam Controller to be recognized, even when I used a keyboard+mouse profile. To get it working, go to ~/.steam/Steam/steamapps/compatdata/32430/pfx/drive_c/users/steamuser/Local\ Settings/Application\ Data/Aspyr/Star\ Wars\ The\ Force\ Unleashed/ and open Config.xml. Change the line that reads "<s id="IsKBAndMouse">TRUE</s>" (without the quotes) to "<s id="IsKBAndMouse">FALSE</s>" (without the quotes).
